items.name_cn:
【sunset Handbag】 m13617 Monogram
The sunset handbag features Monogram Denim canvas. This material is crafted through multiple processes, woven with GOTS-certified cotton yarn to create the Monogram pattern before bleaching. The finished product undergoes sand washing for a unique look, and the brand buckle adds a striking touch.
Size: 27 x 18 x 3 cm

items.name_cn:
【slim trunk Handbag】 m13147 25445 Yellow Flower
The slim trunk handbag debuted in elegant style at the 2025 Cruise early spring show, adding a new member to the classic trunk handbag series. Monogram canvas, Monogram reverse canvas, and smooth calfskin trim are cleverly combined, showcasing Nicolas Ghesquière's signature touch, while the s-lock and metal rivets pay homage to the long-standing tradition of the trunk series.
Size: 12 x 4 x 23 cm
